title: urandra dolichophylla
intro: Urandra dolichophylla, also known as the "Himalayan Sandalwood", is a plant species native to the Himalayan region, characterized by its fragrant leaves and timber. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Urandra dolichophylla include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory health, and acting as an antiseptic. The plant is traditionally prepared as an essential oil, herbal tea, or infused in water to harness its medicinal properties.
